title: senecio cineraria
intro: Senecio cineraria, also known as Dusty Miller, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The plant's leaves are used to prepare herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate stress. Additionally, the plant's extracts have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, supporting overall health and well-being.
